tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Book a new appointment for a patient. Automatically assigns a doctor if not provided and detects priority based on symptoms.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check doctor availability by doctor name or department. Returns available slots and estimated wait time.

tools.name: cancel_appointment
tools.description: Cancel an existing appointment using patient name and date. Phone number is fetched from database.

tools.name: reschedule_appointment
tools.description: Reschedule an existing appointment to a new date. Phone number is fetched from database.

tools.name: log_conversation
tools.description: Store the conversation transcript for analysis and monitoring.
